docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,980.00 FILED BY BENZAHRA, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $ LEFT BLANK SERVED MAR-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED BENZAHRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENZAHRA, MOHAMMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL $7,980.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,980.00, POS SATISFACTORY. CLAIM SUBSTANTIATED BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S REASONABLE ESTIMATES IN THE ABSENCE OF DEFENDANT'S RECORDS NOT AVAILABLE TO HIM. (TIMEKEEPING APP DECTIVATED.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $371.67 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENZAHRA, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL
